mapper.sql: AND ( a.company_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchCondition}, '%') -- 회사명 OR a.company_cd LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchCondition}, '%') -- 회사코드 OR b.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchCondition}, '%') -- 대표자명 )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(a.company_seq) FROM TB_COMPANIES a, TB_USERS b WHERE 1=1 AND a.master_id = b.user_id

SELECT a.company_seq, a.company_cd, a.company_name, a.company_phone, a.addr_kor, a.addr_eng, a.zip_code, a.biz_number, a.customs_num, a.master_id, b.user_name, a.reg_dtime, a.reg_id, a.upd_dtime, a.upd_id, a.use_yn, c.system_id, c.file_id, c.str_file_nm FROM TB_COMPANIES a INNER JOIN TB_USERS b ON a.master_id = b.user_id LEFT OUTER JOIN ( /* [수정 포인트] 최신 파일만 뽑아내는 서브쿼리 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ref_id, system_id ORDER BY file_id DESC) as rn FROM TB_ATCH_FILE_MST WHERE system_id IN ('COMPANY') ) tmp WHERE rn = 1 ) c ON a.company_seq = c.ref_id WHERE 1=1 AND a.company_seq = #{companySeq}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_COMPANIES ( company_seq, company_cd, company_name, company_phone, addr_kor, addr_eng, zip_code, biz_number, customs_num, master_id, user_name, reg_id ) VALUES ( #{companySeq}, #{companyCd}, #{companyName}, #{companyPhone}, #{addrKor}, #{addrEng}, #{zipCode}, #{bizNumber}, #{customsNum}, #{masterId}, #{userName}, #{regId}, )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_COMPANIES SET company_name = #{companyName}, company_phone = #{companyPhone}, addr_kor = #{addrKor}, addr_eng = #{addrEng}, zip_code = #{zipCode}, biz_number = #{bizNumber}, customs_num = #{customsNum}, master_id = #{masterId}, user_name = #{userName}, upd_dtime = #{updDtime}, upd_id = #{updId}, use_yn = #{useYn} WHERE company_seq = #{companySeq}
UPDATE TB_COMPANIES SET use_yn = #{useYn}, upd_dtime = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, upd_id = #{updId} WHERE company_seq = #{companySeq}
